description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named VCPKG Continuous Integration that runs every 6 hours on the master branch, on push to master or tags, and on pull requests. The workflow has four jobs: build_linux, build_mac, release_packages, and Docker_Linux. The build_linux job builds and tests on Linux with multiple compilers and LLVM versions, while build_mac does the same on macOS. The release_packages job creates a release with artifacts if the push event is a tag. The Docker_Linux job builds and tests a Docker image for Linux.
